symptoms.symptom_name: Involuntary urine leakage provoked by coughing, laughing or lifting (raised intra-abdominal pressure)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pressure-provoked leakage is the defining feature of stress incontinence.
Urge incontinence leaks with urgency, not in strict synchrony with a physical strain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of any sudden compelling urgency before the leak

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No preceding urgency effectively excludes detrusor-driven urge incontinence.
Purely mechanical leakage without urgency is consistent with stress incontinence.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute violent paroxysmal cough from a viral URTI (the acute exacerbating trigger)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Repeated cough-driven pressure spikes convert occasional leaks into constant leakage; removing the trigger is central to management.

symptoms.symptom_name: Multiparity (three vaginal deliveries of large babies) and postmenopausal status

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Vaginal delivery of macrosomic infants and postmenopausal oestrogen deficiency are the classic risk factors for pelvic-floor/sphincter weakness.

symptoms.symptom_name: Painful red raw skin of the perineum and inner thighs (patient-reported/observed)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged urine contact with the skin causes irritant contact dermatitis; drives the barrier-care management.

symptoms.symptom_name: No dysuria, no haematuria, no urinary frequency

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of the cardinal cystitis symptoms makes infection unlikely and argues against empirical antibiotics.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal voiding with complete emptying and no suprapubic distension (patient-reported)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal voiding makes overflow unlikely, but history cannot fully exclude retention — palpation/scan is required.

symptoms.symptom_name: Positive cough stress test — direct visualisation of urethral leakage synchronised with a provoked cough

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Demonstrated leakage synchronous with a cough is the confirmatory bedside sign — clinician-only, sealed.
A non-distended bladder on palpation/percussion excludes overflow retention — clinician-only, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Atrophic vaginitis — pale, thin vaginal mucosa on genital examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Postmenopausal urogenital atrophy contributes to sphincter weakness and is a target for topical oestrogen — clinician-only, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Negative point-of-care urinalysis and normal midstream urine culture

investigation_details.expected_result: Negative for nitrites/leucocytes; no bacterial growth
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Infection not objectively excluded, risking either missed UTI or unnecessary antibiotics.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objectively excludes infection as the cause — clinician/lab-only, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Urodynamics — stress-induced leakage without detrusor overactivity

investigation_details.expected_result: Leakage on raised intra-abdominal pressure with no detrusor overactivity
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Not needed acutely; reserved for diagnostic uncertainty or pre-surgical work-up.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms pure stress incontinence and excludes an urge component — specialist investigation, never available in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Pressure-provoked leakage without urgency in a multiparous, postmenopausal woman is a highly specific clinical picture for stress incontinence.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Objectively screens for and excludes urinary infection before considering any antibiotic; appropriate given new urinary symptoms and broken skin.
Confirms the bladder is emptying and excludes overflow retention — the one mimic that cannot be excluded on history in telehealth.
No clinical features of infection; treating without evidence is an error of commission and drives resistance.
Not needed acutely; reserved for diagnostic uncertainty or pre-surgical planning under specialist care.
